entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The cultivated tetraploid crop being improved for agricultural use

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Diploid relatives of peanut used as a source of genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The inherent structure and organization of genes within the peanut genome

entities.name: POLYPLOIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the number of sets of chromosomes

entities.name: SELF POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of pollination within the same plant, contributing to low genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of a crop for better traits

entities.name: PLOIDY LEVEL
entities.description: The number of complete sets of chromosomes in a cell

entities.name: GENETIC DRAG
entities.description: The linkage of undesirable genes with a desired gene during breeding

entities.name: LOW YIELD
entities.description: An undesirable agronomic characteristic associated with wild relatives

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Tools and data such as markers and maps used to facilitate molecular breeding

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using molecular markers and genomic tools to select for desired traits

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome

entities.name: GENETIC AND PHYSICAL MAPS
entities.description: Tools used to determine the relative and absolute positions of genes on chromosomes

entities.name: EXPRESSED SEQUENCE TAGS
entities.description: Short sub-sequences of a cDNA sequence used for gene identification

entities.name: MUTANT RESOURCES
entities.description: Collections of mutated plants used for functional genomics

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS PLATFORMS
entities.description: Tools and techniques used to study the function of genes and their interactions

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with complex traits

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Basic units of heredity associated with specific traits

entities.name: ABIOTIC AND BIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand environmental and biological stresses

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of agricultural importance such as yield and quality

entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material in an organism

entities.name: GENE SPACE SEQUENCE
entities.description: The sequence of the gene-containing regions of the genome

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL APPROACHES
entities.description: The use of biotechnology for the genetic improvement of crops

entities.name: SUPERIOR GENOTYPES
entities.description: Plant genotypes with optimized traits for agricultural production
